name: Margherita Pizza
description: A traditional Neapolitan-style pizza made with hand-stretched dough, topped with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella slices, fragrant basil leaves, and extra virgin olive oil. Baked in a stone oven until the crust is lightly charred and crisp on the outside while remaining soft and airy inside.

name: Spicy Chicken Tacos
description: Tender grilled chicken marinated in a smoky chili-lime sauce, served in warm corn tortillas. Garnished with fresh pico de gallo, sliced avocado, shredded cabbage, cilantro, and a drizzle of chipotle crema for a bold and slightly spicy flavor.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A colorful mix of broccoli, bell peppers, snap peas, carrots, and mushrooms quickly sautéed in a wok with garlic, ginger, and soy sauce. Finished with a splash of sesame oil and served over steamed jasmine rice for a light yet satisfying plant-based meal.

name: Classic Beef Burger
description: A thick, flame-grilled beef patty seasoned with sea salt and black pepper, layered with melted cheddar cheese, crisp lettuce, ripe tomato slices, pickles, and house-made special sauce. Served on a toasted brioche bun with a side of golden fries.

name: Caesar Salad with Grilled Chicken
description: Crisp romaine lettuce tossed in a creamy Caesar dressing made with parmesan, garlic, anchovies, and lemon juice. Topped with herb-seasoned grilled chicken breast, crunchy croutons, and shaved parmesan cheese.

name: Shrimp Pad Thai
description: Stir-fried rice noodles cooked with succulent shrimp, scrambled eggs, tofu cubes, bean sprouts, and green onions. Tossed in a tangy tamarind sauce and finished with crushed peanuts and a squeeze of fresh lime.

name: Chocolate Lava Cake
description: A rich dark chocolate cake baked with a molten center that flows when cut open. Served warm with a scoop of vanilla bean ice cream, fresh berries, and a dusting of powdered sugar.

name: Wild Mushroom Risotto
description: Creamy Arborio rice slowly simmered in vegetable broth and white wine, blended with sautéed wild mushrooms, shallots, and thyme. Finished with butter and grated parmesan for a velvety texture and deep earthy flavor.

name: Grilled Lemon Herb Salmon
description: Fresh Atlantic salmon fillet marinated in lemon juice, garlic, and fresh herbs, then grilled to flaky perfection. Served with roasted baby potatoes and steamed asparagus, finished with a light lemon butter sauce.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Crispy deep-fried chickpea falafel seasoned with cumin, coriander, and parsley, wrapped in warm pita bread. Filled with hummus, tahini sauce, tomatoes, cucumbers, and pickled turnips for a flavorful Middle Eastern-inspired dish.
